entries.name: Frightened
entries.description: A frightened creature takes a bane on all power rolls against the source of their fear. The creature can't willingly move closer to the source of their fear.

entries.name: Dazed
entries.description: A dazed creature can only do one thing on their turn: take an action, take a maneuver, or take a move action. They also can't take triggered actions or free triggered actions.

entries.name: Slowed
entries.description: A slowed creature's speed is reduced to 2 and they can't benefit from bonuses to speed. They also can't shift.

entries.name: Restrained
entries.description: A restrained creature's speed is 0 and they can't benefit from bonuses to speed. Attacks against a restrained creature gain an edge.

entries.name: Weakened
entries.description: A weakened creature's power rolls and damage are halved.

entries.name: Bleeding
entries.description: A bleeding creature takes damage at the start of each of their turns equal to the bleeding value.

entries.name: Burning
entries.description: A burning creature takes fire damage at the start of each of their turns equal to the burning value.

entries.name: Taunted
entries.description: A taunted creature takes a bane on attacks that don't include the source of the taunt as a target.

entries.name: Prone
entries.description: A prone creature is flat on the ground. They must spend half their movement to stand up. Melee attacks against them gain an edge; ranged attacks take a bane.

entries.name: Charmed
entries.description: A charmed creature can't attack the source of the charm and the source gains an edge on social interactions with the charmed creature.

entries.name: Poisoned
entries.description: A poisoned creature takes a bane on all power rolls.

entries.name: Grabbed
entries.description: A grabbed creature's speed is 0. The grabber can move the grabbed creature with them when they move. The grabbed creature can use an action to attempt to escape.

entries.name: Hidden
entries.description: A hidden creature can't be seen or detected by the creatures they are hidden from. Attacks against a hidden creature take a bane; attacks by a hidden creature gain an edge.

entries.name: Shift
entries.description: A shift is a special movement that doesn't provoke opportunity attacks or free strikes. The creature moves the indicated number of squares.

entries.name: Push
entries.description: Forced movement that moves the target the indicated number of squares away from the source. The target doesn't provoke opportunity attacks from this movement.

entries.name: Pull
entries.description: Forced movement that moves the target the indicated number of squares toward the source. The target doesn't provoke opportunity attacks from this movement.

entries.name: EoT
entries.description: End of Turn. The effect lasts until the end of the affected creature's next turn, then ends automatically.

entries.name: Save Ends
entries.description: The effect persists until the affected creature succeeds on a resistance roll at the end of their turn (roll 2d10; 10+ ends the effect).

entries.name: Temporary Stamina
entries.description: Extra stamina layered on top of current stamina. Damage reduces temporary stamina first. Temporary stamina doesn't stack; use the higher value. It expires at the end of the encounter.

entries.name: Damage Resistance
entries.description: Reduces incoming damage by the indicated amount. Applied after all damage calculations. Multiple sources of damage resistance stack.

entries.name: Free Strike
entries.description: A quick, automatic attack a creature can make outside their turn. Typically triggered by an enemy moving out of reach or as part of certain abilities.

entries.name: Forced Movement
entries.description: Movement imposed on a creature by an outside force (push, pull, slide). Forced movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks or free strikes.

entries.name: Power Roll
entries.description: Roll 2d10 + characteristic vs. target's characteristic. Results: 11 or lower (Tier 1), 12-16 (Tier 2), 17+ (Tier 3). Edges add +2; banes subtract -2.

entries.name: Stability
entries.description: Reduces forced movement. When a creature would be force-moved, reduce the distance by their stability value (minimum 0).

entries.name: Winded
entries.description: A creature is winded when their stamina drops to their winded value (half their maximum stamina) or below. Some abilities trigger or change when the creature is winded.
